positive: A stylized, intricate illustration of a soaring majestic owl perched on a silhouetted moonbeam, surrounded by cosmic bioluminescent flora and swirling nebulae. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring clean, strong, high-contrast silhouettes of the fauna and celestial elements against a deep indigo and violet gradient background. The artwork should resemble elegant line art mixed with glowing, ethereal cosmic patterns, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use deep jewel tones, brilliant cyan, and gold accents for glowing elements. Minimalist yet highly detailed, perfect for vector graphics and print scaling.
